panels.title: Average Total Bandwidth for $array array(s) bytes SI
Average Data Reduction Ratio for $array array(s)

targets.expr:
avg(purefa_volume_performance_throughput_iops{dc=~"$dc", array=~"$array", dimension="reads_per_sec"}) by (array,dimension,name)
and
topk($TopItems, avg(rate(purefa_volume_performance_throughput_iops{dc=~"$dc", array=~"$array", dimension="reads_per_sec"}[$__range] @ end() )) by (array,dimension,name))

avg(purefa_volume_performance_throughput_iops{dc=~"$dc", array=~"$array", dimension="writes_per_sec"}) by (array,dimension,name)
and
topk($TopItems, avg(rate(purefa_volume_performance_throughput_iops{dc=~"$dc", array=~"$array", dimension="writes_per_sec"}[$__range] @ end() )) by (array,dimension,name))
sum(purefa_alerts_open{array=~"$array", dc=~"$dc", severity="info"}) by (array) OR on() sum(purefa_alerts_open{array=~"$array", dc=~"$dc"}*0) by (array)
sum(purefa_alerts_open{array=~"$array", dc=~"$dc", severity="warning"}) by (array) OR on() sum(purefa_alerts_open{array=~"$array", dc=~"$dc"}*0) by (array)
sum(purefa_alerts_open{array=~"$array", dc=~"$dc", severity="critical"}) by (array) OR on() sum(purefa_alerts_open{array=~"$array", dc=~"$dc"}*0) by (array)
sum(purefa_alerts_open{array=~"$array", dc=~"$dc", severity=".*"}) by (array) OR on() sum(purefa_alerts_open{array=~"$array", dc=~"$dc"}) by (array)

panels.title: Sum of Space Utilization by $array array(s)

panels.description:
This query is very expensive on Prometheus and the browser. For large environments it may be advisable to reduce scope by using the filter and narrower time frame, use a tabular view or create a recording rule.

https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/basics/#avoiding-slow-queries-and-overloads

targets.expr:
avg(purefa_volume_performance_latency_usec{dc=~"$dc", array=~"$array"}) by (array,dimension,name)
and
topk($TopItems, avg(rate(purefa_volume_performance_latency_usec{dc=~"$dc", array=~"$array"}[$__range] @ end() )) by (array,dimension,name))

targets.expr:

and
